keyFindings.description: createRevertCommit tree-swap is unsafe when main has advanced past the merge commit — replaces entire tree with pre-merge snapshot, wiping subsequent commits
findMergedPR can match wrong PR — no base:main constraint, returns prs[0] blindly
Auto-merge 'no new dependencies' check only matches section headers, not individual package additions
Auto-merge file count threshold deviates from spec (≤5 vs 1-2 files)
No behavioral tests for rollback flow — only input validation covered
